Only a Few Countries Protect More Than 20% of Their Land & Water

Top 40 Countries Ranked by Percentange of Total Land & Water Territory with Protected Status

Slovenia & Germany

lead the world with

more than 70% protercted.

The United States is the largest country

in the top 40, but protects only 16% of

its total territory.

Territory with Protected Status
